change_id.description: UUID of the proposal to decide on
change_id.title: Change Id

ApprovalDecisionType.description: The two possible human verdicts on a change proposal.
ApprovalDecisionType.title: ApprovalDecisionType

AssistantRequest.description:
Body for ``POST /api/v1/assistant/request``.

Every request must belong to a project. An IDE assistant submits a
request to invoke an agent on a specific design work_product.

prompt.description: Free-text prompt or description for generative actions (e.g. generate_cad)
prompt.title: Prompt

session_id.description: Session ID for grouping related requests
session_id.title: Session Id

target_id.description: UUID of the target work_product (optional for generative actions)
target_id.title: Target Id

AssistantRequest.title: AssistantRequest

BomComponentResponse.description: One BOM line item, in the dashboard's camelCase shape.
BomComponentResponse.title: BomComponentResponse

ChangeStatus.description: Lifecycle states for a design-change proposal.
ChangeStatus.title: ChangeStatus

ComponentHealth.description: Health snapshot for one downstream dependency.
ComponentHealth.title: ComponentHealth

ConfidenceTier.description:
Provenance tier for a memory record.

Aligned with MET-462 property-extraction tiers so the same vocabulary
flows from L1 extraction through to L3 reasoning:

* ``VERBATIM`` — copied directly from a structured event field (1.0)
* ``LLM_INFERRED`` — produced by an LLM synthesis step (0.6-0.8)
* ``DERIVED`` — computed from other records (0.4-0.6)
ConfidenceTier.title: ConfidenceTier

ConsolidationMode.description: How the orchestrator behaves on a given pass.
ConsolidationMode.title: ConsolidationMode

mode.description: Consolidation mode. Defaults to on_demand since the REST endpoint is a manual trigger; the Temporal worker handles background.

ConsolidationTriggerResponse.description: Wire shape of a single consolidation pass result.
ConsolidationTriggerResponse.title: ConsolidationTriggerResponse

ConversionResult.description: Response payload for a completed conversion.

cached.description: True if result was served from cache.
cached.title: Cached

glb_url.description: URL to download the GLB file.
glb_url.title: Glb Url

hash.description: SHA-256 content hash of the source file.
hash.title: Hash

ConversionResult.title: ConversionResult

request.description: Opaque run input (goal, spec, config) handed to the harness.
request.title: Request

start.description: Transition queued -> running immediately after creation.
start.title: Start

initial_message.description: If provided, a first message is created automatically
initial_message.title: Initial Message

DeltaTransform.description: Translation delta of a dragged group, in world units (mm).
DeltaTransform.title: DeltaTransform

DependencyStatus.description: Health status for a single component or the overall system.
DependencyStatus.title: DependencyStatus

DesignChangeProposal.description:
A proposed design change awaiting human review.

Created by agents when they want to modify the Digital Twin.
Must be approved before the change is applied.

agent_code.description: Code of the agent proposing the change
agent_code.title: Agent Code

decided_at.description: When the proposal was approved or rejected
decided_at.title: Decided At

description.description: Human-readable description of what the change does
description.title: Description

diff.description: Structured diff of the proposed changes
diff.title: Diff

project_id.description: Project this proposal belongs to (for dashboard scoping, MET-518)
project_id.title: Project Id

requires_approval.description: Whether this change requires explicit human approval
requires_approval.title: Requires Approval

reviewer.description: Who approved or rejected the proposal
reviewer.title: Reviewer

session_id.description: Session under which this proposal was created
session_id.title: Session Id

status.description: Current lifecycle status of the proposal

work_products_affected.description: UUIDs of Digital Twin work_products affected by this change
work_products_affected.title: Work Products Affected

DesignChangeProposal.title: DesignChangeProposal

FieldDelta.description: Change for a single metadata field.

source_path.description: Absolute path to the source file
source_path.title: Source Path

IngestResponse.title: IngestResponse

InsightKind.description: What kind of statement the insight is.
InsightKind.title: InsightKind

InsightResponse.description: Wire shape of a single consolidated insight.
InsightResponse.title: InsightResponse

InsightStatus.description:
Lifecycle state of a stored insight (MET-455).

* ``ACTIVE`` — trusted; surfaced to agents normally.
* ``STALE_WARN`` — confidence has decayed (or re-validation failed);
  flagged for review. Still readable, but consumers should treat it
  with caution / prefer fresher insights.
InsightStatus.title: InsightStatus

KnowledgeEntryResponse.description: API response model for a single knowledge entry.
KnowledgeEntryResponse.title: KnowledgeEntryResponse

KnowledgeHitResponse.description:
Wire shape of a single knowledge-base hit.

Used by ``POST /v1/memory/search`` (design rationale) and
``GET /v1/memory/components/{name}`` (component context). Fields
mirror ``digital_twin.knowledge.service.SearchHit``.
KnowledgeHitResponse.title: KnowledgeHitResponse

MemoryHitResponse.title: MemoryHitResponse

agentCode.description: Optional filter to a specific agent.
agentCode.title: Agentcode

limit.description: Maximum number of experiences to return.
limit.title: Limit

minSimilarity.description: Optional retrieval-confidence floor: drop hits whose cosine similarity is below this value. None = no floor.
minSimilarity.title: Minsimilarity

onlySuccess.description: True = success-only, False = failures-only, None = no filter.
onlySuccess.title: Onlysuccess

limit.description: Maximum number of hits to return.
limit.title: Limit

Append one event to a session timeline.

``type`` is the normalized capture vocabulary shared by every client
adapter (MET-497): thought / action / decision / observation / error /
result.

ThreadSummaryResponse.title: ThreadSummaryResponse

TwinNodeResponse.title: TwinNodeResponse

TwinRelationshipListResponse.title: TwinRelationshipListResponse

info.description: HTTP/WebSocket front door for the MetaForge platform
info.title: MetaForge Gateway

get.description:
Generate a compliance checklist for the given project and markets.

Markets are provided as a comma-separated query parameter, e.g.
``?markets=UKCA,CE,FCC``.
Get evidence coverage statistics for a project.

post.description: Link a piece of evidence to a compliance checklist item.

get.description: Retrieve all evidence records for a checklist item.

schema.title: Response Get Evidence Api V1 Compliance  Project Id  Evidence  Item Id  Get

get.description: Return the aggregated health of the gateway and its dependencies.
List pending design-change proposals, optionally filtered by session/project.
Return a single design-change proposal.

post.description:
Approve or reject a pending design-change proposal.

On approval, run the proposal's diff via the apply executor (if wired) so the
change is actually applied to the twin (HITL: propose → approve → apply).

Submit a request to an agent via the orchestrator.

Looks up the workflow definition for ``body.action``, creates a
WorkflowRun, and dispatches it through the Scheduler.

get.description: Poll the status of a workflow run.
SSE endpoint — streams real-time events for *session_id*.

List BOM components, optionally scoped to a project.

Empty (``{components: [], total: 0}``) when the project has no BOM — not a
404, so the dashboard renders a clean empty state.
Return all available chat channels.
List threads with optional filtering and pagination.

post.description: Create a new thread, optionally with an initial message.

get.description: Return a single thread with all its messages.

post.description:
Append a message to an existing thread.

After persisting the user message, the handler routes it to the
appropriate domain agent (when an LLM is configured).  The agent's
response is inserted into the thread automatically.

get.description:
Stream real-time events for a chat thread via Server-Sent Events.

The client receives events as they occur:

- ``message.created`` -- a new message was added
- ``agent.typing``    -- an agent is processing
- ``agent.done``      -- an agent finished
- ``error``           -- an error occurred

The connection stays open until the client disconnects or the server
closes the stream.

post.description:
Turn a drag delta into a parametric constraint, and — when the dragged
group maps to a live FreeCAD session object (``session_id`` + ``obj_id``) —
**bind it into the model** so Apply re-parameterizes and re-solves (MET-531).

Without a session/object it stays a suggestion-only stub (MET-519). Binding
is best-effort: an adapter error leaves the suggestion intact with
``bound=False`` and a ``binding_error``.

Upload a STEP/IGES file and convert to GLB.

Returns the conversion result with a URL to the GLB file and metadata.
Results are cached by content hash — re-uploading the same file is instant.

get.description: Retrieve a cached conversion result by content hash.
Download the converted GLB file.
Retrieve conversion metadata (part tree, stats, materials).

schema.title: Response Get Metadata V1 Convert  File Hash  Metadata Get

get.description: Models for a provider. OpenAI-compatible + configured → live-fetched; else empty.
List registered providers (configured ones first) + the active selection.
MCP tools/connectors reachable via the gateway's bridge (empty if none wired).

schema.title: Response List Tools V1 Harness Tools Get

post.description:
Ingest a document (markdown / plain text) via the L1 ``KnowledgeService``.

Backs the ``forge ingest <path>`` CLI (MET-336). Heading-aware
chunking, dedup, and citation metadata are handled by the
underlying provider — the route is a thin pass-through.

Manually ingest a knowledge entry.

Routes through ``KnowledgeService`` when available so the chunk
pipeline, dedup, and citation-field round-trip apply consistently
with ``/documents`` and ``/search`` (MET-390).

get.description:
Semantic search over indexed knowledge.

Routes through ``KnowledgeService`` when available so it shares
the same backend as ``/ingest`` and ``/documents`` (MET-390).

List ingested knowledge sources via ``KnowledgeService.list_sources()``.

Backs the ``forge sources list`` CLI (MET-411). Mirrors the schema
surfaced by the ``metaforge://knowledge/sources`` MCP resource.

delete.description:
Delete every chunk for a source via ``KnowledgeService.delete_by_source()``.

Backs the ``forge sources delete`` CLI (MET-411). Returns the
chunk count the backend removed; ``0`` when the source was already
absent — callers treat that as a no-op rather than an error.

get.description:
Per-source detail — looks up by exact ``source_path`` match.

No dedicated single-source accessor exists in the ``KnowledgeService``
contract, so we list and find — fine for CLI usage where the user
has already picked a known path. Returns 404 when the source isn't
registered.
Retrieve a single knowledge entry by ID.

Component usage / relationship knowledge for ``name`` (MET-471).

Wraps ``MemoryClient.get_component_context``: a typed convenience
over the L1 knowledge base keyed off ``KnowledgeType.COMPONENT``.
Empty / whitespace ``name`` returns 422 — that's a client bug, not
a backend gap.

post.description:
Trigger one consolidation pass synchronously.

Defaults to ``on_demand`` mode (manual triage with the importance
floor relaxed). Pass ``mode=background`` to run the standard pass
or ``mode=janitor`` to re-validate previously-stored insights
without synthesizing new ones.

get.description:
List consolidated insights, newest first.

Excludes ``STALE_WARN`` insights by default — agents should act on
fresh lessons. Pass ``includeStale=true`` for an audit / review view
that includes faded insights. Optional ``theme`` narrows to one
consolidation theme.

post.description:
Return experiences most similar to the supplied goal.

Body shape matches ``MemoryRetrieveRequest``. The response carries
``hits`` sorted by descending similarity, plus the echoed ``query``
and ``total_found`` so callers can paginate without re-derivation.

Semantic search over design-decision knowledge (MET-471).

Wraps ``MemoryClient.search_design_rationale``: a typed convenience
over the L1 knowledge base that asks "why was X decided?" and
returns ranked hits keyed off ``KnowledgeType.DESIGN_DECISION``.
Requires the gateway to have wired a knowledge_service on
``app.state.knowledge_service``; the 503 from ``_get_client``
covers the case where the service hasn't initialised.

get.description: List all hardware projects.

post.description: Create a new hardware project and seed an initial WorkProduct.

get.description: Get a single project by ID.

delete.description:
Remove a work-product link from a project (MET-484).

Lets callers clean up duplicate/stale work-product references without
deleting the project. 404 if no matching link exists.

get.description: SSE stream of a run's status transitions until it reaches a terminal state.

List all agent sessions.

Merges internal Temporal ``WorkflowRun``s with externally-recorded
agent sessions (MET-493) so MCP/CLI-driven work shows up alongside
autonomous runs. Most-recent-first.

``project_id`` scopes to one project (MET-516). Internal Temporal runs
carry no project, so they're excluded when a project filter is set.

post.description: Open a new externally-recorded agent session.

get.description: Get a single session by ID (store first, then workflow engine).

patch.description: Complete a session (set terminal status + optional summary).

post.description: Append one event (thought / action / decision / …) to a session.

Upload a design file and register it as a work product in the Twin.

Accepts STEP, IGES, KiCad (.kicad_sch, .kicad_pcb), and FreeCAD
(.FCStd) files. Metadata is extracted automatically based on file type.

get.description:
List file links with live sync status, optionally scoped to a project.

A link has no project of its own; scoping (MET-517) keeps only links whose
linked work product belongs to ``project_id``.

schema.title: Response List File Links V1 Twin Links Get

get.description:
List work-product nodes in the Digital Twin.

``project_id`` scopes the view to a single project (MET-491). Omitted
or empty returns every node (including unscoped legacy nodes) —
preserving the prior global behaviour. A specific ``project_id``
returns only that project's nodes; unscoped nodes are excluded.

delete.description:
Delete a work-product node, its project links, and its MinIO blob (MET-484).

Without ``cascade`` a delete that would orphan dependents returns 409.
Best-effort on the blob (a storage failure doesn't block the delete).

parameters.description: Also delete dependents that would orphan
parameters.name: cascade

schema.description: Also delete dependents that would orphan
schema.title: Cascade

get.description: Get a single work-product node by ID.
Return a metadata diff between two revisions (1-indexed).

Stream a work product's stored file for download / open / preview.

``download=false`` (default) returns the blob inline with a preview
content-type so the dashboard can render PDFs, images, text, and BOMs
in place; ``download=true`` forces a ``Content-Disposition: attachment``.

parameters.description: Force attachment download vs inline preview
parameters.name: download

schema.description: Force attachment download vs inline preview
schema.title: Download

post.description: Record a new revision and apply metadata updates to a work product.

delete.description: Remove the file link for a work product.

get.description: Get the file link for a work product, with live sync status.

post.description:
Link a work product to an external source file.

The source file must exist on the gateway's filesystem. Once linked,
you can call ``POST /sync`` to re-import changes, or enable ``watch``
for automatic detection.

get.description:
Convert a CAD work-product's STEP file to GLB and return the URL.

Reads the STEP file from the shared adapter workspace, converts it
via the OCCT converter, and returns the GLB URL + metadata.

schema.title: Response Get Node Model V1 Twin Nodes  Node Id  Model Get

post.description:
Manually trigger a sync for a linked work product.

Re-reads the source file, extracts metadata, and updates the Twin
node if the file has changed.

schema.title: Response Sync File Link V1 Twin Nodes  Node Id  Sync Post

get.description: Return the full revision history for a work product.
List all edges in the Digital Twin graph.
